title: Donald Robinson
compiled_truth: Donald Robinson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-14 to 2002-02-07), Donald Robinson sent 32 and received 178 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [Cara Semperger](people/cara-semperger) (23), [Diana Scholtes](people/diana-scholtes) (17), [Sean Crandall](people/sean-crandall) (15), [Shift Dl-Portland](people/shift-dl-portland) (11), [Shift Portland](people/shift-portland) (10). Mailbox folders observed: credit, inbox, read, scheduling, settlements.
timeline:
